heading: Move a Multi-Region Cluster
body:
Use the following procedure to move nodes to one or more regions in an
`M10` or larger multi-region cluster:

Click Edit Config and select the cluster that you
want to move from the drop-down menu.

Alternatively, if you are already viewing the specific cluster,
click Configuration.

For a given region, click the currently selected
Region and pick a new region from the drop-down list.
If you modify the Preferred region, the Atlas
cluster calls for one or more elections to select a new
[primary](manual/reference/glossary) in the selected region. See
Test Primary Failover for
instructions on testing your application response to a replica set
election before changing the Preferred cluster.

To change the number of nodes Atlas deploys to a given
region, increase or decrease the Number of Nodes
value. The total number of nodes across the Preferred
region and all Electable regions must be an odd
number.
